POST.description: Initiates the report creation process, fetches conversion rates, and sends an email.

suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th: btc_usd_rate, btc_eur_rate = await fetch_conversion_rates()\nreport_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\nawait send_email(report_id, btc_usd_rate, btc_eur_rate)
suggested_workflow.description: Fetch conversion rates and send an email with the report ID.

GET.description: Retrieves a stored report based on the report ID.
